mockEvents.name: National Military Survivor Seminar & Good Grief Camp
mockEvents.description: Our premier national gathering connecting survivors with workshops, peer sharing, and specialized youth grief counseling camps.

mockEvents.name: Midwest Suicide Loss Survivor Retreat
mockEvents.description: A healing weekend designed for suicide loss survivors to share support, learn coping tools, and find community.

mockEvents.name: LGBTQ+ Survivor Grief Connection Group
mockEvents.description: Weekly online support group sharing experiences of military loss within the LGBTQ+ survivor family.

mockEvents.name: TAPS Outdoors - Rockies Alpine Backpacking Trek
mockEvents.description: Honoring our loved ones in nature. A challenging backcountry hike designed for adult siblings and children.

mockEvents.name: Overdose Loss Spanish-Speaking Survivor Webinar
mockEvents.description: Un seminario web interactivo sobre el duelo y la curación después de una pérdida por sobredosis.

mockEvents.name: Southern Friends & Battle Buddy Care Gathering
mockEvents.description: A local casual gathering for battle buddies and friends grieving the death of a service member.
